Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Enum Class PotLinkType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<PotLinkType>
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotLinkType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<PotLinkType>, Constable
public enum PotLinkType extends Enum<PotLinkType>
Enumerates the types of hyperlinks that can be associated with presentation elements.

This enum classifies hyperlinks into categories such as external web addresses, internal navigation within the presentation, email links, file references, and placeholders. It provides methods to determine if a link is external or internal and to infer the link type from a raw address string based on common patterns and protocols.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    BOOKMARK
    A link that targets a named bookmark within the presentation document.
    EMAIL
    An email link using the mailto: protocol.
    FILE
    A link that references a local or network file, typically using a file:// URI or a file path.
    FIRST_SLIDE
    A link that navigates to the first slide of the presentation.
    LAST_SLIDE
    A link that navigates to the last slide of the presentation.
    NEXT_SLIDE
    A link that navigates to the next slide relative to the current position.
    NONE
    Represents the absence of a meaningful link or an empty link address.
    PREVIOUS_SLIDE
    A link that navigates to the previous slide relative to the current position.
    SLIDE
    A link that targets a specific slide within the same presentation.
    URL
    A standard web URL using the HTTP or HTTPS protocol.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • URL

      public static final PotLinkType URL
      A standard web URL using the HTTP or HTTPS protocol.

    • SLIDE

      public static final PotLinkType SLIDE
      A link that targets a specific slide within the same presentation.

    • FIRST_SLIDE

      public static final PotLinkType FIRST_SLIDE
      A link that navigates to the first slide of the presentation.

    • LAST_SLIDE

      public static final PotLinkType LAST_SLIDE
      A link that navigates to the last slide of the presentation.

    • NEXT_SLIDE

      public static final PotLinkType NEXT_SLIDE
      A link that navigates to the next slide relative to the current position.

    • PREVIOUS_SLIDE

      public static final PotLinkType PREVIOUS_SLIDE
      A link that navigates to the previous slide relative to the current position.

    • FILE

      public static final PotLinkType FILE
      A link that references a local or network file, typically using a file:// URI or a file path.

    • EMAIL

      public static final PotLinkType EMAIL
      An email link using the mailto: protocol.

    • BOOKMARK

      public static final PotLinkType BOOKMARK
      A link that targets a named bookmark within the presentation document.

    • NONE

      public static final PotLinkType NONE
      Represents the absence of a meaningful link or an empty link address.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static PotLinkType[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static PotLinkType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • isExternal

      public boolean isExternal()
      Indicates whether this link type points to an external resource.

      A link is considered external if it references a resource outside the presentation document, such as a web page, a local file, or an email address.

      Returns:
      true if this link type is URL, FILE, or EMAIL; false otherwise.

    • isInternal

      public boolean isInternal()
      Indicates whether this link type points to an internal location within the presentation.

      A link is considered internal if it is used for navigation between slides or to bookmarks within the same presentation document.

      Returns:
      true if this link type is SLIDE, BOOKMARK, FIRST_SLIDE, LAST_SLIDE, NEXT_SLIDE, or PREVIOUS_SLIDE; false otherwise.

    • fromAddress

      public static PotLinkType fromAddress(String address)
      Determines the appropriate link type by analyzing the given address string.

      This method examines the address for known protocol prefixes, file path patterns, and internal presentation navigation markers to classify the link. If the address is null or empty, NONE is returned. The matching is performed case-insensitively.

      Usage Example

      
 PotLinkType type1 = PotLinkType.fromAddress("https://example.com");
 // type1 is PotLinkType.URL

 PotLinkType type2 = PotLinkType.fromAddress("mailto:user@example.com");
 // type2 is PotLinkType.EMAIL

 PotLinkType type3 = PotLinkType.fromAddress("Slide5");
 // type3 is PotLinkType.SLIDE
      Parameters:
      address - the raw hyperlink address string to be analyzed.
      Returns:
      the inferred PotLinkType; never null.
